title: tithymalus galilaeus
intro: Tithymalus galilaeus, also known as Euphorbia syriaca, is a plant species belonging to the spurge family, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers and milky sap. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tithymalus galilaeus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, or salves, and is often applied topically to alleviate various health issues.
